build_recipe_after_component_response: choose final sparse repair atoms from official CUDA component-response evidence
encode a charged lossy geometry base plus sparse repair payload inside archive.zip
record deterministic archive manifest, payload hashes, decoder contract, and source manifest
run exact CUDA auth eval before any score, rank, promotion, or retirement claim
canonical_score_source_required: archive.zip -> inflate.sh -> upstream/evaluate.py via experiments/contest_auth_eval.py --device cuda

allowed_sources: official CUDA component-response curves with archive.zip -> inflate.sh -> upstream/evaluate.py custody
component_response_handoff.selection_rule_after_response: replace proxy selected point ids with response-safe sparse repair atoms that satisfy PoseNet/SegNet gates under the recorded byte budget

details.assumption: explicit operator-provided lossy-base byte hypothesis; not measured score evidence

details.description: lossy base only; exact CUDA eval still required before any score use

parent_report.note: parent report is written after spec generation and records this spec's SHA-256

prohibited_uses: paper empirical claim without later exact CUDA archive evidence
score_claim_warning: No score claim is made by this planner. All byte budgets are empirical planning estimates. A concrete archive, payload closure, and exact CUDA auth eval are required before ranking, promotion, retirement, or any score claim.
